leadText: The Scope Lens (Japanese: ピントレンズ Focus Point Lens) is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It increases the holder's critical hit ratio.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Raises the critical hit ratio of the holder by one stage.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Pokémon, the Scope Lens increases the Pokémon's critical hit probability by flat 30% R B /15% T D B S L . If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C Raises critical hit ratio. (HOLD) R S Colo XD A hold item that raises the critical-hit rate. E A hold item that improves the critical-hit rate. FR LG An item to be held by a Pok é mon . A lens that boosts the critical-hit ratio of the holding Pok é mon . D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a lens that boosts the holder's critical-hit ratio. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a lens for scoping out weak points. It boosts the holder's critical-hit ratio.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B A hold item that boosts the Pokémon's critical-hit rate for moves and attacks. MD T D S A held item that boosts the Pokémon's critical-hit rate for moves and attacks. MD GtI It boosts the holder's critical-hit rate for moves. MD RT DX When equipped, it boosts the wearer's critical-hit rate for moves used on enemies.
